title: Quick-Fix Spanish Pimiento Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix dish featuring fresh and chewy pimientos, seasoned with white wine vinegar and pickled vegetables for a tangy vegetarian-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: pickle slices (such as sweet pickle or capers)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add pimiento, white wine vinegar, and salt. Stir well to combine.
Garnish with pickle slices if using.
Cook until the pimientos are tender and slightly crispy, around 5-7 minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish or with rice.
